title: Change Specs Readonly Panel
description: Read-only presentation of a change’s **spec scope** and per-spec **`dependsOn`** on the Overview tab. Editing happens only via [`ui:change-scope-dialog`](../change-scope-dialog/spec.md).
context: Read-only presentation of a change’s **spec scope** and per-spec **`dependsOn`** on the Overview tab. Editing happens only via [`ui:change-scope-dialog`](../change-scope-dialog/spec.md).

rules.requirement: panel lists each spec in scope with dependencies
rules: For every `specId` on `ChangeDetailDto`, the panel MUST show the spec ID and its `specDependsOn[specId]` entries (or an explicit empty state). Data MUST come from the loaded detail DTO only. Flat spec and dependency lists MUST follow [`ui:design-system`](../design-system/spec.md) ascending order.
The component MUST NOT call mutating port methods and MUST NOT render add/remove controls.

scenarios.requirement: panel lists each spec in scope with dependencies
scenarios.name: Spec with dependencies shows arrows

scenarios.requirement: panel lists each spec in scope with dependencies
scenarios.name: Spec without dependencies shows empty copy
given: a spec in specIds with no dependsOn entry
then: panel shows “No declared dependencies” under that spec

scenarios.requirement: panel lists each spec in scope with dependencies
scenarios.name: No specs in scope
No mutate controls
then: there are no Add/Remove spec buttons in the panel
AND no PATCH is triggered from this component
